children.name: IngestData
children.purpose: Read raw data from source, parse records, store in raw_data, and log ingestion
children.behavior: Based on source type, read from CSV/JSON/API, parse into records, store in raw_data, and append log entry
children.signature: def IngestData(pipeline_request: dict, raw_data: database) -> dict

constraints.description: Must parse all records before writing to raw_data
Log entry must include step name, timestamp, record count

acceptance_criteria.description: raw_data contains all parsed records after execution
pipeline_log contains an entry for ingestion step

children.name: TransformData
children.purpose: Apply transformation rules to raw_data, store in processed_data, skip malformed records
children.behavior: Read raw_data, apply each rule to each record, skip and log malformed records, store valid results in processed_data
children.signature: def TransformData(pipeline_request: dict, raw_data: database) -> dict

constraints.description: Malformed records must be skipped and logged, not written to processed_data
Transformation rules must be applied in order specified in transform_config

acceptance_criteria.description: processed_data contains only valid transformed records
pipeline_log contains entry for transformation step with counts

children.name: ValidateData
children.purpose: Check processed_data against quality rules, mark invalid records, compute quality_score
children.behavior: Read processed_data, apply quality rules to each record, compute quality_score, mark invalid records, store results back to processed_data
children.signature: def ValidateData(pipeline_request: dict, processed_data: database) -> dict

global_vars.description: Read and update processed_data with quality marks

data_operations.description: Read records, mark invalid, write back

constraints.description: quality_score must be computed per record based on quality rules
Invalid records must be marked but not removed from processed_data

acceptance_criteria.description: processed_data records have quality_score and validity flag after execution
pipeline_log contains entry for validation step

children.name: ExportData
children.purpose: Format validated records as output and log export
children.behavior: Read processed_data, filter only validated records, format as CSV or JSON, return as data list, log export
children.signature: def ExportData(pipeline_request: dict, processed_data: database) -> dict

constraints.description: Only validated records (quality_score >= threshold) should be exported
Output format must match format specified in pipeline_request

acceptance_criteria.description: export_result.data contains only validated records in correct format
pipeline_log contains entry for export step

governance_notes: Parent global_vars conservation verified: raw_data read_write covered by IngestData (write) + TransformData (read); processed_data read_write covered by TransformData (write) + ValidateData (read_write) + ExportData (read); pipeline_log read_write covered by all four children (each writes). No parent operation dropped.
